We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 4.75s, d = 149.17m:
t^2 = 4.75 * 4.75:
4.75 * 0.05 = 0.2375
4.75 * 0.70 = 3.3250
4.75 * 4.00 = 19.0000
0.2375 + 3.3250 = 3.5625
3.5625 + 19.0000 = 22.5625
k = 149.17 / 4.75^2 = 149.17 / 22.5625 = 149.170 / 22.562
= 0 + 1 * 149170 / 22562
= 1 + 1 * 126608 / 22562
= 2 + 1 * 104046 / 22562
= 3 + 1 * 81484 / 22562
= 4 + 1 * 58922 / 22562
= 5 + 1 * 36360 / 22562
= 6 + 1 * 13798 / 22562
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 137980 / 22562
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 115418 / 22562
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 92856 / 22562
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 70294 / 22562
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 47732 / 22562
= 6.5 + 0.1 * 25170 / 22562
= 6.6 + 0.1 * 2608 / 22562
= 6.60 + 0.01 * 26080 / 22562
= 6.61 + 0.01 * 3518 / 22562
= 6.610 + 0.001 * 35180 / 22562
= 6.611 + 0.001 * 12618 / 22562
= 6.611

t = 4.31s, d = 122.81m:
t^2 = 4.31 * 4.31:
4.31 * 0.01 = 0.0431
4.31 * 0.30 = 1.2930
4.31 * 4.00 = 17.2400
0.0431 + 1.2930 = 1.3361
1.3361 + 17.2400 = 18.5761
k = 122.81 / 4.31^2 = 122.81 / 18.5761 = 122.810 / 18.576
= 0 + 1 * 122810 / 18576
= 1 + 1 * 104234 / 18576
= 2 + 1 * 85658 / 18576
= 3 + 1 * 67082 / 18576
= 4 + 1 * 48506 / 18576
= 5 + 1 * 29930 / 18576
= 6 + 1 * 11354 / 18576
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 113540 / 18576
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 94964 / 18576
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 76388 / 18576
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 57812 / 18576
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 39236 / 18576
= 6.5 + 0.1 * 20660 / 18576
= 6.6 + 0.1 * 2084 / 18576
= 6.60 + 0.01 * 20840 / 18576
= 6.61 + 0.01 * 2264 / 18576
= 6.610 + 0.001 * 22640 / 18576
= 6.611 + 0.001 * 4064 / 18576
= 6.611

t = 2.63s, d = 45.73m:
t^2 = 2.63 * 2.63:
2.63 * 0.03 = 0.0789
2.63 * 0.60 = 1.5780
2.63 * 2.00 = 5.2600
0.0789 + 1.5780 = 1.6569
1.6569 + 5.2600 = 6.9169
k = 45.73 / 2.63^2 = 45.73 / 6.9169 = 45.730 / 6.916
= 0 + 1 * 45730 / 6916
= 1 + 1 * 38814 / 6916
= 2 + 1 * 31898 / 6916
= 3 + 1 * 24982 / 6916
= 4 + 1 * 18066 / 6916
= 5 + 1 * 11150 / 6916
= 6 + 1 * 4234 / 6916
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 42340 / 6916
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 35424 / 6916
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 28508 / 6916
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 21592 / 6916
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 14676 / 6916
= 6.5 + 0.1 * 7760 / 6916
= 6.6 + 0.1 * 844 / 6916
= 6.60 + 0.01 * 8440 / 6916
= 6.61 + 0.01 * 1524 / 6916
= 6.610 + 0.001 * 15240 / 6916
= 6.611 + 0.001 * 8324 / 6916
= 6.612 + 0.001 * 1408 / 6916
= 6.612

t = 4.01s, d = 106.31m:
t^2 = 4.01 * 4.01:
4.01 * 0.01 = 0.0401
4.01 * 4.00 = 16.0400
0.0401 + 16.0400 = 16.0801
k = 106.31 / 4.01^2 = 106.31 / 16.0801 = 106.310 / 16.080
= 0 + 1 * 106310 / 16080
= 1 + 1 * 90230 / 16080
= 2 + 1 * 74150 / 16080
= 3 + 1 * 58070 / 16080
= 4 + 1 * 41990 / 16080
= 5 + 1 * 25910 / 16080
= 6 + 1 * 9830 / 16080
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 98300 / 16080
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 82220 / 16080
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 66140 / 16080
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 50060 / 16080
= 6.4 + 0.1 * 33980 / 16080
= 6.5 + 0.1 * 17900 / 16080
= 6.6 + 0.1 * 1820 / 16080
= 6.60 + 0.01 * 18200 / 16080
= 6.61 + 0.01 * 2120 / 16080
= 6.610 + 0.001 * 21200 / 16080
= 6.611 + 0.001 * 5120 / 16080
= 6.611

k values: 6.611, 6.611, 6.612, 6.611
k values (sorted): 6.611, 6.611, 6.611, 6.612
The median k is 6.611.

For t = 4.36:
t^2 = 4.36 * 4.36:
4.36 * 0.06 = 0.2616
4.36 * 0.30 = 1.3080
4.36 * 4.00 = 17.4400
0.2616 + 1.3080 = 1.5696
1.5696 + 17.4400 = 19.0096
= 19.0096

d = 6.611 * 19.0096:
6.611 * 0.0006 = 0.0039666
6.611 * 0.0090 = 0.0594990
6.611 * 9.0000 = 59.4990000
6.611 * 10.0000 = 66.1100000
0.0039666 + 0.0594990 = 0.0634656
0.0634656 + 59.4990000 = 59.5624656
59.5624656 + 66.1100000 = 125.6724656
= 125.672

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{125.672}
